publishedAbstract: When mounting an RBD type volume in Openshift, we see the error message below: ~~~ Warning FailedMount 30s (x71 over 256m) kubelet MountVolume.SetUp failed for volume "pvc-xxxxxxxx-xxxx-xxxx-xxxx-xxxxxxxxxxxx": applyFSGroup failed for vol 0001-0011-openshift-storage-0000000000000001-xxxxxxxx-xxxx-xxxx-xxxx-xxxxxxxxxxxx: readdirent /var/lib/kubelet/pods/xxxxxxxx-xxxx-xxxx-xxxx-xxxxxxxxxxxx/volumes/kubernetes.io~csi/pvc-xxxxxxxx-xxxx-xxxx-xxxx-xxxxxxxxxxxx/mount/x/db: bad message ~~~
publishedTitle: Volume mount fails with error message 'MountVolume.SetUp failed for volume "pvc-x" : applyFSGroup failed for vol y: readdirent /var/lib/kubelet/pods/../mount/x/db: bad message'
